block_02: Let’s Celebrate the Carnival Season in a Trading Tournament!
block_10: The most favorite time of the year is coming! To keep your spirits up, IQ Option is hosting a trading competition with amazing prizes.
block_11: The tournament will be taking place from Friday, February 25 until Saturday, March 2. Top-15 traders on the leaderboard will share a guaranteed prize pool of $5,000.
block_17: Get your festive mood on and prepare for the party! 🙌
